headline: BXP Reports Strong Leasing Momentum Led by Premier Office Demand
summary: BXP lands 200K+ square feet in San Francisco leases, filling 50 Hawthorne and pushing 680 Folsom past 90% as tech and AI demand fuels premium office growth.
